idea-plugin.name: Project Directory Grouper
idea-plugin.description:
English

Organizes recent projects by their direct parent directory in File | Recent Projects and the main toolbar project widget.

The File menu keeps the native Recent Projects entry and shows shared parent directories as flat titled sections. Projects without a matching sibling are collected under Other.

The project widget keeps its project-row layout and shows each shared parent directory as a flat section. Its bold section name is embedded in a matching rainbow-colored thin border. Remaining projects are collected under the neutral Other section. Project icons, names, paths, provider paths, and Git branches remain visible. If IntelliJ supplies no branch, an optional background fallback reads and caches .git/HEAD without running a Git command.

Grouping and missing-branch fallback can be configured from Settings | Tools | Project Directory Grouper, which is also available from the settings entry in the project widget. Disabling grouping restores the platform project lists. Existing Welcome Screen groups are not modified.

中文

在文件 | 最近的项目和主工具栏的项目微件中，按项目的直接父目录整理最近项目。

文件菜单保留原生的最近的项目入口，将共享父目录显示为带标题的平铺分区； 没有同目录项目的单项统一归入其他。

项目微件保留项目行样式，将共享父目录显示为平铺分区。加粗组名嵌入顶部细边框， 每个父目录组使用组名与边框一致的彩虹色；其余项目归入中性灰色的其他分区。 项目图标、名称、路径、提供方路径和 Git 分支仍会显示。IntelliJ 未提供分支时， 可选的后台回读功能会读取并缓存 .git/HEAD，不会执行 Git 命令。

可在设置 | 工具 | 项目目录分组中分别配置分组和分支回读，项目微件底部也保留设置入口。 关闭分组后恢复平台原始项目列表，不会修改欢迎页中的现有项目组。
